g.text: AGM (Agent Gateway Manager) - C4 Component Diagram

text.tspan: 1. User: agm new my-session → 2. CLI validates flags →
3. SessionManager generates UUID → 4. Adapter starts agent CLI →
5. ManifestStore persists metadata → 6. TmuxBackend attaches session
1. Session A enqueues message for B → 2. Daemon polls queue (30s) →
3. StateMonitor checks B's state → 4. If READY: deliver message →
5. Update B's state to BUSY → 6. Acknowledge delivery
Unified Agent interface with multiple implementations.
Enables CLI-agnostic session management and command translation.
